body:
There is a big problem we have: https://github.com/link-assistant/web-capture/pull/107#issuecomment-4316778290

There should be no truncated logs anymore. It as design choice long ago, and now something broken.

We should use only full logs. And big log should have been uploaded with gh-upload-log

Check this log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/konard/log-tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d/main/tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d.log?token=AAK5SYHNCKNNFGLGY6CTZ23J5R6G2

```
box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ $ --status 426a8408-967a-45d7-8e10-6b985736df4d
78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d
  uuid 78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d
  status executed
  exitCode 0
  command "solve https://github.com/link-assistant/web-capture/issues/106 --think max --tool codex --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary"
  logPath /tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d.log
  startTime "2026-04-24T21:44:57.526Z"
  endTime "2026-04-25T08:32:33.955Z"
  workingDirectory /home/box
  shell /bin/sh
  platform linux
  options
    isolated screen
    isolationMode detached
    sessionName 426a8408-967a-45d7-8e10-6b985736df4d
    user false
    keepAlive false
    useCommandStream false
box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ gh-upload-log /tmp/start-command/logs/isolation/screen/78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d.log
⏳ Uploading 37.51 MB (🔒 private)...
hint: Using 'master' as the name for the initial branch. This default branch name
hint: is subject to change. To configure the initial branch name to use in all
hint: of your new repositories, which will suppress this warning, call:
hint: 
hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>
hint:

hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
hint: 
hint: 	git branch -m <name>
Initialized empty Git repository in /tmp/log-tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d-1777105965748/.git/
[main (root-commit) bf9cbaf] Add log file
 1 file changed, 65676 insertions(+)
 create mode 100644 tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d.log
konard
https://github.com/konard/log-tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d
To https://github.com/konard/log-tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d.git
 * [new branch]      HEAD -> main
branch 'main' set up to track 'origin/main'.
✅ Repository created (🔒 private)
🔗 https://github.com/konard/log-tmp-start-command-logs-isolation-screen-78003ab5-3a5f-4cbb-81e0-05fce6a8916d

⚠️  Note: Raw URL token expires in ~10 minutes for private repositories
box@9ccd887a1e60:~$ 
```

Double check if it is related to new changes at `gh-upload-log`, and also prepare to support them all:

- https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/pull/28
- https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/pull/30

Note that for public repositories logs should uploaded as public, and for private repositories as private.

We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration.

If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
title: We must never show truncated log on `--attach-logs`, and logs processing should be correct
